TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjinavanavalj, title = Tjinavanavalj, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjinavanavalj} }

S.FORM: alang Tjinavanavalj ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 62 buwan, 195 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 191 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Amis 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjinavanavalj hya' ga Tjakuvukuvulj. tay 'zil na Tjinavanavalj hya' ga Kuangka. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lahaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Lahaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Lahaw hya' ga Tranan. tay mkraya' na Lahaw hya' ga Tampya. tay mkraya' na Lahaw hya' ga Ulay. tay mkyahu' na Lahaw hya' ga Tranan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjinavanavalj ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Rayiyong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 62 buwan, 195 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 191 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Amis 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjinavanavalj hya' ga Tjakuvukuvulj. tay 'zil na Tjinavanavalj hya' ga Kuangka. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lahaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Lahaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Lahaw hya' ga Tranan. tay mkraya' na Lahaw hya' ga Tampya. tay mkraya' na Lahaw hya' ga Ulay. tay mkyahu' na Lahaw hya' ga Tranan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjina*ana*alj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu rajijoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tjina*ana*alj ħjaʔ ɣa tjaku*uku*ulj. taj ʔzil na tjina*ana*alj ħjaʔ ɣa kuaŋka. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na laħaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na laħaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na laħaw ħjaʔ ɣa tranan. taj mkrajaʔ na laħaw ħjaʔ ɣa tampja. taj mkrajaʔ na laħaw ħjaʔ ɣa ulaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na laħaw ħjaʔ ɣa tranan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
